apihelp-pageviewinfo-param-metric: Cabirka loo adeegsanayo tirinta booqashooyinka. Iyadoo ku xiran adeegga gadaale (backend) ee la isticmaalayo, dhammaan cabbirrada lama taageeri karo. Waxaad isticmaali kartaa API-ga siteinfo ([[Special:ApiHelp/query+siteinfo|action=query&meta=siteinfo]]) si aad u hubiso kuwa la taageerayo, qaybta <samp>pageviewservice-supported-metrics</samp> / ''magaca module-ka'' (<samp>siteviews</samp>, <samp>mostviewed</samp>, iwm.)
apihelp-query+pageviews-summary: Waxay muujisaa xogta booqashooyinka bog kasta (tirada booqashooyinka maalinlaha ah ee mid kasta oo ka mid ah <var>$1 maalmood</var> ee ugu dambeeyay).
apihelp-query+pageviews-extended-descrip: Qaabka natiijadu waa cinwaanka bogga (oo leh hoos-xariiqyo) => taariikh (Ymd) => tirin.
apihelp-query+pageviews-example: Muuji tirakoobka booqashooyinka bogga ee bogga hore.
apihelp-query+siteviews-summary: Waxay muujisaa xogta booqashooyinka guud ee bogga (wadarta booqashooyinka maalinlaha ah ee mid kasta oo ka mid ah <var>$1 maalmood</var> ee ugu dambeeyay).
apihelp-query+siteviews-example: Muuji wadarta guud ee booqashooyinka bogagga ee dhammaan goobta.
apihelp-query+siteviews-example2: Muuji wadarta guud ee booqdayaasha gaarka ah ee dhammaan goobta.
apihelp-query+mostviewed-summary: Waxay taxdaa bogagga ugu booqashada badan (iyadoo lagu salaynayo tirada booqashooyinka maalintii hore).
apihelp-query+mostviewed-example2: Muuji xogta booqashooyinka bog kasta oo ka mid ah 10-ka bog ee ugu sarreeya.
